converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary records
New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary
6600
2.1 cubic feet. 2.1 cubic feet.
1948-2007. Scrapbooks and subject files. Scrapbooks and subject files kept by the New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary from 1948-2000. Collection material in English 5146576
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel
Date completed:
September 2004
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel, 2004
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary is a women's organization affiliated with the New York State Veterinary Medical Society.
RELATED MATERIAL
The New York State Veterinary Medical Society records RMC # 2541
Cite As:
The New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary records, #6600. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Scrapbooks and subject files kept by the New York State Veterinary Medical Society Auxiliary from 1948-2000. Also, files relating to annual meetings, awards sponsored by the Auxiliary, and State Fair displays.
Scope and content
Includes reports, correspondence and financial files.
Scrapbooks. Women -- Societies and clubs. New York State Veterinary Medical Society
